tasks.description: Initialize packages/slack-mcp/ scaffolding: package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, .gitignore

tasks.description: Define shared TypeScript types: SlackConfig, NotificationEvent, PhaseTransition, TaskCompletion, Milestone, SpecProgress, SpecKitPhase
tasks.notes: Phase: setup | Target: packages/slack-mcp/src/types.ts | Gate: T001 | Verify: types.ts exports all types from contracts/slack-mcp-tools.ts; npx tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.description: Write unit tests for config module: env var validation, mode detection (webhook/mcp/both/noop), timeout parsing, defaults, error messages
